claim: As the quality of healthcare improved , estimates for the CFR in China decreased from 17.3 % to 0.7 % during the 2019–20 coronavirus pandemic .
evidence: The infection mortality rate ( IFR ) incorporates a further adjustment to allow for undiagnosed and/or asymptomatic infections ; as at 22 March 2020 it has been estimated at 0.20 % . `` Global Covid-19 Case Fatality Rates '' The Centre for Evidence-Based Medicine , Oxford University , retrieved 25 March 2020Over time , estimates for the CFR in China decreased markedly from 17.3 % ( for those with symptom onset 1–10 January 2020 ) to 0.7 % ( for those with symptom onset after 1 February 2020 ) .

claim: After December 2019 , COVID-19 had spread to more than 100 countries .
evidence: First identified in Wuhan , Hubei , China , in December 2019 , the outbreak was recognised as a pandemic by the World Health Organization ( WHO ) on 11 March 2020 .

claim: After January 9 , more than 400 people have died of coronavirus during the pandemic .
evidence: The first local transmission of the virus outside China occurred in Vietnam between family members , while the first local transmission not involving family occurred in Germany , on 22 January , when a German man contracted the disease from a Chinese business visitor at a meeting .

claim: Confirmed cases of coronavirus outside of mainland China include one man in Hong Kong and one woman in Macau .
evidence: Confirmed cases outside of mainland China include two women in Thailand , one man in Japan , one woman in South Korea , one woman in Taiwan , one man in Hong Kong , one woman in Macau and one man in the United States .

claim: Less than 5 people died of coronavirus on 21st January 2020 during the pandemic .
evidence: The outbreak resulted in initial deaths on 9 January 2020 and 16 January 2020 , both in men over 60 , a third on 19 January 2020 , and six more on 21 January 2020.

evidence: more than 7,000 deaths have been attributed to COVID-19 .

claim: Coronavirus has killed more than two people outside of China .
